cases.text_a: We settled on a 10-minute idle timeout before the session auto-locks.
cases.text_b: Sessions lock themselves automatically once ten minutes pass with no activity.

cases.text_a: Coffee after 2pm keeps me up, so I stopped drinking it past noon.
cases.text_b: Anything caffeinated in the afternoon wrecks my sleep, which is why I cut it off at midday now.

cases.text_a: The team agreed Fridays are meeting-free to protect deep work time.
cases.text_b: No standups, syncs, or reviews get scheduled on Fridays — that day stays open for focused work.

cases.text_a: Backups run nightly at 2am against the production database.
cases.text_b: Every night around 2am, a snapshot of the prod DB gets taken and stored.

cases.text_a: The vendor contract caps our monthly spend at $500.
cases.text_b: Our agreement with the vendor allows unlimited monthly spend with no ceiling.

cases.text_a: Hazar prefers working in complete silence, no music at all while coding.
cases.text_b: Hazar always has a playlist running in the background when he codes.

cases.text_a: The migration script is safe to re-run multiple times without side effects.
cases.text_b: Running the migration script a second time duplicates every row it touched the first time.

cases.text_a: The office lease renews automatically each year unless cancelled 90 days out.
cases.text_b: The lease expires at the end of its term and must be manually re-signed every year.

cases.text_a: We chose Postgres for the order-history service because of its JSON column support.
cases.text_b: After hitting scaling limits with JSON columns, we moved the order-history service to a dedicated document store.

cases.text_a: The onboarding flow asks for email first, then password, then a profile photo.
cases.text_b: We dropped the profile-photo step from onboarding after seeing it caused most of the drop-off.

cases.text_a: Our pricing page lists a single $12/month plan with no tiers.
cases.text_b: As of this quarter, the pricing page now shows three tiers: Starter, Pro, and Team.

cases.text_a: The retry policy waits a fixed 5 seconds between attempts.
cases.text_b: We replaced the fixed 5-second retry wait with exponential backoff plus jitter.

cases.text_a: The espresso machine in the kitchen needs descaling every three months.
cases.text_b: The design team picked a teal accent color for the new marketing site.

cases.text_a: Hazar's RTX 4070 Super has 12GB of VRAM for local model work.
cases.text_b: The lease on the downtown office runs through next August.

cases.text_a: The changelog script pulls commit messages since the last tagged release.
cases.text_b: Hazar's older friend has been working through recovery from alcohol dependency.

cases.text_a: Quarterly taxes are due on the 15th for anyone filing as self-employed.
cases.text_b: The wiki's frontmatter linter rejects any page missing a schema_version field.
